title: Cuttack, Odisha — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Cuttack, Odisha: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Cuttack is a city in Odisha with a population of 650,000. The former capital of Odisha, known for its silver filigree work, historic Barabati Fort, and as a commercial center.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
